ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Commedia Bellissima composta per il Fumoso della Congrega de Rozzi
ItacWorkItem.Notes: Imperfect; wanting the titlepage and last three pages, which are supplied in MS. In the title page: `In Siena alla Loggia del Papa`. First edition 1552. On the history of this controversial comedy, see Roberto Alonge, `Nota al "Travaglio"`, in Il teatro dei Rozzi di Siena (Florence, 1967)

Essay.EssayTitle: Sonetto di M. Pietro Bertini Aretino in lode del Fumoso

ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
